g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which job platforms have free APIs or RSS feeds?')
sendPrompt('How do I scrape Internshala RSS feeds?')
sendPrompt('How to scrape Naukri and Shine?')
sendPrompt('What free remote job platforms have open data?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up a GitHub Actions cron schedule?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a Python job scraper with httpx and BeautifulSoup?')
sendPrompt('How do I extract skills from job descriptions using NLP?')
sendPrompt('What Supabase tables do I need for job scraping?')
sendPrompt('How do I store skill frequency counts in Supabase?')
sendPrompt('How do I store user skill profiles in Supabase?')
sendPrompt('How do I track historical skill demand over time?')
sendPrompt('What charts and visualizations should the dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does the skill gap analyzer work for users?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Resend for job alert emails?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a Telegram bot for job alerts?')
